scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && wait-on backend/dist/main.js && electron ."
scripts.rebuild:electron: npm_config_runtime=electron npm_config_target=30.5.1 npm_config_disturl=https://electronjs.org/headers npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source && npm_config_runtime=electron npm_config_target=30.5.1 npm_config_disturl=https://electronjs.org/headers npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source --prefix backend
